title: Tasks assigned to me not displaying in My Work

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a task that’s assigned to me, due tomorrow. It’s in a board that is listed for My Tasks view.
I changed the status to Stuck and now that task is no longer displayed on the My Work page.

Other tasks with the Stuck status are displaying in My Work.

I can’t figure out why this one task is not displaying.

posts.author: tjb (Troy Brophy)
posts.cookedHtml: It showed up today when I logged back on.
